message:
feat(parser): multi-dim subscripts, set comp if, annotation calls, trailing commas

- Add slice_expr AST node for multi-dimensional subscripts like arr[:42, ..., :24:]
- Fix set comprehension to use parseOrExpr for if conditions (not ternary)
- Support function call style type annotations: some(module)
- Handle trailing commas in RHS tuple assignments: x = val,
